name: SaaS VP Engineering Intro
bodyTemplate: Hi {{firstName}}, noticed {{company}} is scaling. Open to a short chat on improving {{painPoint}}?

name: SaaS VP Engineering Follow-up
bodyTemplate: Sharing one quick thought based on your stack. Should I send a concise breakdown?

name: FinTech CTO Intro
bodyTemplate: Hi {{firstName}}, teams like yours use our approach to improve throughput while keeping compliance guardrails.

name: FinTech CTO Objection Handler
bodyTemplate: Totally fair on timing. We usually start with a low-risk pilot and clear rollback criteria.

name: Mid-Market Ops Intro
bodyTemplate: Hi {{firstName}}, can I share how similar teams reduced manual follow-up while increasing meetings booked?
